title: Mesa Palace Stucture Datapack
description: This Datapack generate in your world a big structure in the Badlands biome.
body:
_**--------Mesa Palace---------**_

-You can only find this dungeon in the Mesa

![mesa palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee1e13021777d882dc0a1e3da7225f646d740e8c_0.webp)


-When you will search the **Mesa Palace** you must loot a **Vanilla Trial chamber**
in the ominous Vaults to get the **_Mesa Palace Explorer map_**

![mesa palace card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25dde2d3ee575888820627a7e0e76c247359013.png)
